pr.title: Record: 11L + EMA + Tight SWA + QAT0.15 + VE128 + Partial RoPE + LN Scale (val_bpb: 1.1243)

output.summary: Stack EMA with tight SWA, earlier Late QAT, and VE-enhanced partial-RoPE on an 11-layer Muon-trained transformer with per-row int6 quantization.
techniques: EMA stacked with Tight SWA to blend averaging signals
Earlier Late QAT under int6 fake quantization
Muon optimizer + VE + partial RoPE in 11-layer GQA architecture
